project_name: Gen C - Decentralized Medical Records dApp

hierarchy.h1: font-['Unbounded'] text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
hierarchy.h2: font-['Unbounded'] text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold
hierarchy.label: font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-zinc-500

surfaces.nav: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#09090B]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-zinc-800
surfaces.inputs: bg-[#09090B] border border-zinc-800 rounded-none text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00FF41] focus:border-[#00FF41] font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] text-sm
surfaces.crypto_badges: inline-flex items-center bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 text-[#00FF41] px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] uppercase

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid (Dense, technical, scan-able). Expose the skeleton with visible grid borders.

components_strategy.charts: Recharts for analytics. Custom SVG for Merkle tree node visualizations.
components_strategy.tables: Dense rows, 1px bottom border border-zinc-800, text-sm. Hover state: hover:bg-zinc-900.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF41] text-black font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] font-bold rounded-none hover:bg-[#00cc33] uppercase text-sm tracking-widest px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white uppercase text-sm px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-white font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] text-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors

components_strategy.badges: Square edges. Color-coded by state (e.g., #FFBF00 for Batching/Pending, #00FF41 for Anchored/Decrypted)
components_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with weight='bold' or 'regular' for a distinct technical feel.

backgrounds.description: Abstract green matrix light lines, ideal for the login page hero background.

avatars.description: Doctor portrait in dark background, useful for doctor dashboard profile or registry.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: MANDATORY: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, table rows, badges) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend font families to include 'Unbounded' (sans) and 'IBM Plex Mono' (mono). Add custom colors like #00FF41.
THEME: Apply an aggressively technical dark mode. Avoid soft shadows, heavy gradients, or purple/violet completely.
TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'Unbounded' for large headers and prominent labels. Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for body text, numbers, wallet addresses, CIDs, buttons, and navigation.
CRYPTOGRAPHY CELEBRATION: Create specific UI components for hash strings, CIDs, and wallet addresses. They should look like terminal outputs (e.g. bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-terminal-green).
LAYOUT: Use 'Grid Borders' layout pattern. Most dashboard cards should lack rounded corners (rounded-none) to enhance the brutalist/technical aesthetic.

FLOWS: Build out 4 distinct pages/views: (1) Login via Wallet, (2) Admin Dashboard (Registry + LPA Batch viewer), (3) Patient Dashboard (decrypted records + signatures), (4) Doctor Dashboard (Search DID + encrypt/upload pipeline).

VISUALS: For the Doctor upload flow, explicitly visualize the sequence: 'AES-256 Encrypting -> Pinata IPFS Uploading -> CP-ABE Policy -> LPA Enqueueing'. Use staggered micro-animations (framer-motion) to show this progression.
MERKLE TREE: For the Admin LPA Batch viewer, implement a basic visual representation of a Merkle Tree showing CIDs rolling up into a single Root Hash.
TESTING: Add data-testid to every button, link, and input (e.g. data-testid='wallet-connect-btn', data-testid='upload-medical-record-btn').
